title: 1) During diagnosis
text:
Palpate muscles on the neck and face again before insertion. The shape and location of the
muscles can vary based on the patient's posture. Remember that facial muscles are very tiny
~ !  ~
59
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
and the dermis is really thin, and that the practitioner is handling those small parts on the
sensitive face. Therefore, you should concentrate on every step.
